safeToRun: Writes local queue artifacts only; no external API calls, scraping, downloads, or API keys.
allowedContentRule: Book-like sources only, with full text allowed only when public domain, CC0, CC BY, CC BY-SA, or similarly permissive item-level reuse rights are clear.
excludedContentRule: No newspapers, blogs, general web pages, serial feeds, uncertain-rights scans, or platform-only records enter the corpus.
culturalSafety: First Australian and Indigenous knowledge remains restricted metadata only unless explicit rights, authority, and culturally safe review are obtained.
